g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the exact V1 setup on one droplet?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the move from V1 to V2?')
sendPrompt('What does V3 multi-city infrastructure look like?')
sendPrompt('When should I move from V1 to V2?')
sendPrompt('When should I move from V2 to V3?')
sendPrompt('What does V3 to enterprise look like?')
sendPrompt('How do we migrate from V1 to V2 without downtime?')
sendPrompt('How does Typesense scale from V1 to V3?')
g.text: V1: self-hosted on droplet (free) → V2: dedicated $6/mo Hetzner node → V3: Typesense Cloud $25/mo or Meilisearch

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the multi-city data isolation strategy?')
g.text: Single Supabase DB · city column on shops/orders · Typesense geo-filter per city · no separate DBs needed until V3
